attacking_style: Initiates early breakaway attacks on first climbs of the day, willing to attack from established breakaways on penultimate climbs to defend position or gain time.
team_tactics: Limited team support evident; operates independently in breakaways, relying on personal aggression rather than coordinated team setups.
terrain_preference: Early climbs where breakaways form; performs on sustained climbs where aggressive tempo riding can be maintained. Penultimate climbs offer tactical advantage for his style.
vulnerability: Vulnerable when peloton maintains high aggressive tempo that prevents breakaways from establishing gaps; struggles when unable to infiltrate early moves.
key_patterns: Attacks early on first climbs to establish breakaway positions (2 observations)
Shows willingness to attack from within breakaways on penultimate climbs (2 observations)
Operates as aggressor even when holding advantageous position like race lead (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: demonstrated consistent breakaway-focused tactics across both observations, though high peloton tempo limited effectiveness in 2019
